zh.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset Lord of Weldon是Geoffrey Basset of Weldon的兒子，於大約1160年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 威爾頓。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1258年之前。

nameMeanings.name: Weldon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Northamptonshire called Weldon, from Old English well(a) ‘spring, stream’ + dūn ‘hill’. This name was brought to Ireland (Dublin) in the 14th century. It has been Gaelicized as de Bhéalatún.

variants.name: Welden
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places so named, for example near Augsberg and near Kaufbeuren.

variants.name: Weldin
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Weldon  .
German: perhaps a variant of   Welden  .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: ‘White’. Li Bai (  701–762 ) was a famous Tang poet. This name is also pronounced ‘Bo’.

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Reduced form of Old Norse Þorfriðr, from Þórr ( see Tor ) + friðr ‘peace’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset Lord of Weldon was born about 1160, in Great Weldon, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Geoffrey Basset of Weldon. He had at least 1 son. He died before 1258.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset Lord of Weldonは約1160年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグレアト ウエルドンでGeoffrey Basset of Weldonの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1258年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset Lord of Weldon(은)는 대략 1160년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 그리트 웰던에서 Geoffrey Basset of Weldon의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1258년 이전 사망했다.
